The health benefits of Pinus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Pinus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
